variants: Kaelin Dossou is a prominent figure in the field of infectious disease epidemiology. As part of her efforts to advance understanding in the area, she authored the Quartzleaf Frequency Analyzer, which has gained recognition for its innovative approach. Kaelin honed her skills under the mentorship of Jagdeep Natt during her doctoral studies. Additionally, she is affiliated with the Periwinkle Planters Group, where she explores her passion for gardening. Her research and projects are largely supported by the Outpost Discovery Association, a primary funding source for her work.

Outside of her professional pursuits, she enjoys being a member of the Periwinkle Planters Group. The Outpost Discovery Association serves as her main funding source, helping to facilitate her research activities.
